query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `pro_billing_cycles` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `officer_id` int NOT NULL,
  `company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `assignment_id` int NOT NULL,
  `billing_month` int NOT NULL,
  `billing_year` int NOT NULL,
  `amount_omr` decimal(10,3) NOT NULL DEFAULT '100.000',
  `status` enum('pending','paid','overdue','cancelled','waived') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `invoice_number` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `paid_at` timestamp NULL,
  `due_date` timestamp NULL,
  `notes` text,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `invoice_number` (`invoice_number`),
  KEY `idx_pbc_officer` (`officer_id`),
  KEY `idx_pbc_company` (`company_id`),
  KEY `idx_pbc_status` (`status`),
  KEY `idx_pbc_period` (`billing_year`, `billing_month`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `officer_payouts` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `officer_id` int NOT NULL,
  `payout_month` int NOT NULL,
  `payout_year` int NOT NULL,
  `employment_track` enum('platform','sanad') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'platform',
  `total_collected_omr` decimal(10,3) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.000',
  `commission_pct` decimal(5,2) DEFAULT '12.50',
  `commission_omr` decimal(10,3) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.000',
  `fixed_salary_omr` decimal(10,3) DEFAULT '600.000',
  `gross_omr` decimal(10,3) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.000',
  `deductions_omr` decimal(10,3) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.000',
  `net_omr` decimal(10,3) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.000',
  `status` enum('pending','approved','paid','on_hold') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `paid_at` timestamp NULL,
  `notes` text,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_op_officer` (`officer_id`),
  KEY `idx_op_status` (`status`),
  KEY `idx_op_period` (`payout_year`, `payout_month`)
);
